_comment: - FRED: Community MCP server exists (mcp-server-fred). Could replace custom code.
- CoinGecko: Community server exists. Free tier compatible. Could replace custom code.
- Financial Datasets: NO community server. Requires trailing slashes on all URLs
which breaks standard OpenAPI-based MCP servers. MUST be custom.
- Finnhub: Community server exists BUT free tier rate limits (60/min) need custom
handling. Our wrapper adds rate-limit awareness. Recommend keeping custom.
- Yahoo Finance: No auth needed, scraping-style API. Custom wrapper preferred
for reliability (handles User-Agent rotation, response parsing).
RECOMMENDATION: Keep all 5 tools as custom implementations for now.
The trailing slash requirement on Financial Datasets and the structured error
responses we need across all tools mean community servers would need wrappers anyway.
Revisit when MCP server ecosystem matures with better error standardization.

credentials._note: All credentials via environment variables. Never hardcode.

quirks: TRAILING SLASH REQUIRED on all endpoint URLs

coingecko.env_var: none — free tier requires no key
